## Problem

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope

- [ ] This is appropriate for the core plugins (not project-specific)
- [ ] This would benefit multiple projects/teams

## Additional Context

Any relevant examples, references, or mockups.
